module.title: SAP TM Reporting, Analytics & Performance Management

learningObjectives.title: Understand transportation cost analytics
learningObjectives.description: Explain freight spend analysis and identification of major logistics cost drivers.

learningObjectives.title: Understand analysis dimensions
learningObjectives.description: Describe cost breakdown by carrier, mode, route, region, customer, and product.

learningObjectives.title: Understand optimization decisions
learningObjectives.description: Clarify balancing cost reduction initiatives with delivery service performance.

sections.content: Transportation Cost Analytics in SAP Transportation Management enables organizations to analyze freight spending, identify cost drivers and optimize logistics expenses. By evaluating transportation costs across carriers, transportation modes, routes, regions and products, businesses can reduce logistics expenses while maintaining service quality.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: Transportation Cost Analytics focuses on understanding why transportation costs occur and how they can be optimized.

sections.title: Transportation Cost Breakdown
rows: Road, Rail, Air, Ocean cost comparison

sections.content: A manufacturing company analyzes transportation costs using SAP TM dashboards and discovers that air shipments account for only 8% of deliveries but consume over 30% of transportation expenses. By shifting suitable shipments to road transport, the company significantly reduces logistics costs.

sections.title: Operational Cost vs Strategic Cost Analysis
Best Practice
sections.content: Analyze transportation costs by multiple dimensions such as carrier, transportation mode, customer and route to identify the true causes of logistics expenses.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A global electronics manufacturer used SAP TM cost analytics to optimize transportation modes and carrier selection. Annual freight expenditure decreased by approximately 14% without affecting delivery performance.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: Certification questions often ask which dimensions are commonly used for transportation cost analysis. Remember: carrier, route, transportation mode, region, customer and product.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Reducing transportation cost should never compromise delivery performance or customer service. Always balance cost optimization with service quality.

items: Transportation Cost Analytics analyzes freight spending.
Cost can be analyzed by carrier, route, mode, customer and product.
KPIs help identify major cost drivers.
Analytics supports budgeting and cost optimization.
Effective cost management improves profitability while maintaining service quality.
